theme_and_archetype.description: A premium, 'Doctor Command Center' feeling like Stripe/Linear but tailored for healthcare. High usability, glassmorphic 'Crystal' surfaces, white base with soft blue/purple floating orbs, rounded geometry, and zero clutter. AI interactions feel deeply integrated, not bolted on.

structure.sidebar: fixed w-64 h-screen left-0 top-0 hidden lg:block

surface_classes.glass_card: bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/40 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(15,24,54,0.04)] rounded-[20px]
surface_classes.glass_pill: bg-white/60 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/30 rounded-full px-4 py-1.5 shadow-sm

micro_interactions.hover: transition-all duration-300 ease-out hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:shadow-lg hover:border-white/60
micro_interactions.status_pulse: relative flex h-3 w-3.

Sidebar.classes: glass-card h-[calc(100vh-32px)] m-4 flex flex-col justify-between sticky top-4

KpiStrip.classes: col-span-12 grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-6 gap-4

ActiveConsultationPanel.classes: col-span-12 xl:col-span-8 glass-card p-6 min-h-[400px] flex flex-col
ActiveConsultationPanel.description: The command center core. Previews the active patient. Includes AI-extracted symptoms, critical alerts, AI suggestions, and a quick prescription builder.

LiveConsultationQueue.classes: col-span-12 xl:col-span-4 glass-card p-6 flex flex-col
LiveConsultationQueue.description: List of waiting patients with AI intake completion status and urgency indicators.

AlertsSafetyPanel.classes: col-span-12 lg:col-span-4 glass-card p-6 border-t-4 border-t-[#E85A5A]
AlertsSafetyPanel.description: High-priority warnings (drug interactions, abnormal labs). Must stand out without breaking aesthetics.

QuickActions.description: Grid of 4-6 highly actionable buttons. Uses btn-primary and btn-ghost classes with Lucide icons.

AnalyticsTeaser.description: Mini charts showing time saved by AI and outcome patterns. Use Recharts with minimalist strokes (no axes).

PatientQueueSummary.description: Aggregate view of the queue by type and average wait times.

TemplatesPreview.classes: col-span-12 lg:col-span-4 glass-card p-6 relative overflow-hidden
TemplatesPreview.description: Phase 2 placeholder. Shows faded template cards with a 'Coming Soon' glass overlay.

DoctorJourney.classes: col-span-12 w-full overflow-x-auto pb-4 hide-scrollbar flex gap-4 snap-x
DoctorJourney.description: Horizontal scrollable step cards illustrating the AI-assisted workflow.

queue.title: Queue is clear
queue.message: Time for a well-deserved break. No waiting patients.

alerts.title: All systems nominal
alerts.message: No active safety warnings or critical labs.

schedule.title: Open schedule
schedule.message: No upcoming appointments for the rest of the day.

accessibility.aria_live: Use aria-live='polite' for the Consultation Queue and Alerts Panel.
accessibility.keyboard_nav: Ensure full keyboard navigability within the Active Consultation Rx Builder.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes.
